prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `94414823`.
codex_response:
Implemented task `94414823` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_94414823/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_94414823/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_94414823/generator.py). The rule is: keep the gray square frame, read the two outside markers, put the marker on the outbox main diagonal corner (`NW` or `SE`) into the `TL/BR` interior quadrants, and put the other marker into the `TR/BL` quadrants. The `opus46` summary matched the official examples, so I used it; no `notes.md` was needed, and no new shared primitive was added.

The generator stays on-family by preserving the `10x10` canvas, `6x6` gray frame, singleton side markers, and the same `2x2` quadrant fill pattern. The only added variability is sliding the frame within the valid `3x3` placement window so the shared builder can reach `1000` unique inputs. Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` examples, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 94414823` passed `1000/1000`.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/94414823/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/94414823/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/94414823/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/94414823/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/94414823/previews/preview_03.png). No terminal image renderer was available here, so the final sanity check used generated samples from `task.json` plus confirmation that the preview sheets were emitted.
